new.title: 英国居民消费价格指数（CPI）
new.subtitle: 欧元/英镑盈利率提高至
new.text-1: 居民消费价格指数是英国 一个重要指标。如果CPI超出预期，则很有可能是因为通胀压力带来的迹象，英镑可能价格走势下滑。如今，通货膨胀水平创近四年来历史新高。
new.text-2: 交易者都在等待：英镑将在CPI公布后如何表现？
new.text-3: 您可以把这次看成交易美元/日元盈利91%*的机会！
new.text-4: You be the judge! Make a short-term prediction about the price of Apple with Binary Options or speculate on the long-term outlook with Classic Options.
new.material: This material is not an investment advice
new.asterisk-2: **NOTE: Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future performance.  Forecasts are not reliable indicator of future performance.
new.note-text: You can find the latest market overviews and forecasts on the IQ Option blog.
new.asterisk: * 金额将在投资成功的前提下计入账户。该优惠有效期为8:00至11:00 GMT。
